verses.1: Hear the LORD’s word, you children of Israel,
verses.2: There is cursing, lying, murder, stealing, and committing adultery;
verses.4: “Yet let no man bring a charge, neither let any man accuse;
verses.5: You will stumble in the day,
verses.6: My people are destroyed for lack of knowledge.
verses.7: As they were multiplied, so they sinned against me.
verses.8: They feed on the sin of my people,
verses.9: It will be like people, like priest;
verses.10: They will eat, and not have enough.
verses.11: Prostitution, wine, and new wine take away understanding.
verses.12: My people consult with their wooden idol,
verses.13: They sacrifice on the tops of the mountains,
verses.14: I will not punish your daughters when they play the prostitute,
verses.16: For Israel has behaved extremely stubbornly, like a stubborn heifer.
verses.19: The wind has wrapped her up in its wings;
